summary: Frontend testing for navigation restructuring complete. All 10 test cases PASSED. New dual-navigation pattern working correctly: horizontal top module bar with 6 modules + contextual left sidebar for Service Desk/Assets/Contracts/Settings. Dashboard and Analytics are full-width (no sidebar).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation restructuring from single sidebar to dual-nav pattern fully verified. All 6 top modules working (Dashboard, Service Desk, Assets, Contracts, Analytics, Settings). Full-width pages (Dashboard, Analytics) have no sidebar. Other modules have contextual left sidebar with correct items. Mobile responsive at 768px shows hamburger menu and horizontal scrolling tabs. Test IDs present: data-testid='module-tabs', data-testid='module-{id}', data-testid='logout-btn', data-testid='mobile-menu-btn'.

top_module_bar.details: 6 modules visible: Dashboard, Service Desk, Assets, Contracts, Analytics, Settings. Active module highlighted blue (#0F62FE). data-testid='module-tabs' and module-{id} present.

dashboard_full_width.details: No sidebar on /admin/dashboard. Full-width content with 4 KPIs (Companies: 34, Users: 9, Devices: 49, Parts Tracked: 10). Charts: Warranty Status, Recent Devices visible.

service_desk_sidebar.details: Sidebar appears on /admin/service-requests with heading 'SERVICE DESK'. 5 items: Tickets, Workforce, Calendar, Ticketing Setup, Renewal Alerts. Active item highlighted blue.

assets_sidebar.details: Sidebar appears on /admin/devices with heading 'ASSETS'. 6 items: Devices, Accessories, Asset Groups, Parts, Deployments, Device Catalog.

contracts_sidebar.details: Sidebar appears on /admin/amc-contracts with heading 'CONTRACTS'. 6 items: AMC Contracts, AMC Requests, Licenses, Subscriptions, Internet Services, Service History.

analytics_full_width.details: No sidebar on /admin/analytics. Full-width analytics with all 12 internal tabs: Overview, Tickets, Workforce, Financial, Clients, Assets, SLA, Workflows, Inventory, Contracts, AI Insights, Profitability.

settings_sidebar.details: Sidebar appears on /admin/organization with heading 'SETTINGS'. Items include: Organization, Portal Settings, Master Data, Item Master, Credentials, Products, Orders, Parts Requests, Pending Bills, Usage & Limits. Feature-flagged items: WatchTower, MoltBot, Remote Mgmt.

navigation_between_modules.details: Clicking through Service Desk -> Assets -> Analytics -> Settings correctly switches sidebar context. Analytics shows no sidebar (full-width).

logo_and_user.details: Company name 'Manish Malhotra' visible in top-left. User 'CK Admin' visible in top-right. Logout button with data-testid='logout-btn' present.

mobile_responsive.details: At 768px width: hamburger menu appears (data-testid='mobile-menu-btn'), module tabs scroll horizontally, slide-out menu opens from right with all modules and user info.
